name: Health & Fitness
description: Free health and fitness calculators — hydration, macros, heart-rate zones, training and more. Instant, private and running entirely in your browser.

tools.name: Water Intake Calculator
tools.description: Estimate your daily water needs based on weight, exercise and climate, shown in litres, cups and bottles.

tools.name: Macro Calculator
tools.description: Split your daily calories into protein, carbs and fat with diet-style presets and a per-meal breakdown.

tools.name: Heart Rate Zone Calculator
tools.description: Calculate your 5 training heart-rate zones using the Karvonen method with your resting heart rate.

tools.name: Calories Burned Calculator
tools.description: Estimate calories burned for dozens of activities using MET values, your weight and duration.

tools.name: One Rep Max Calculator
tools.description: Estimate your 1RM from a lift and reps, with a full percentage-of-max training table.

tools.name: Running Pace Calculator
tools.description: Turn a distance and time into pace per km and per mile, plus projected 5K, 10K, half and marathon times.

tools.name: Blood Alcohol (BAC) Calculator
tools.description: Estimate blood alcohol concentration with the Widmark formula and a time-to-sober estimate.

tools.name: Protein Intake Calculator
tools.description: Find your daily protein target range based on body weight and your goal.

tools.name: Waist-to-Hip Ratio Calculator
tools.description: Calculate your waist-to-hip ratio and see your health-risk category by sex.

tools.name: Body Surface Area Calculator
tools.description: Compute body surface area with the Mosteller and Du Bois formulas side by side.
